title: K.I.S.S.
content:
**K.I.S.S.** , the abbreviation for  _Keep It Simple, Stupid!_ , is the #1 philosophy I've been emphasizing when I do interface design and coding for a very long time. But lately, I feel like I've dropped out the  **simpleness**  somewhere along the line. Everything I've written these days seem to be so complicated (but the fact is, those things can be done in various of simple, straight-forward ways). I think I'll have to take 3 steps back (don't ask "why 3 ?") to look at what's going on. Hmmmm ...

Some of the sites with "simple design" which I would like to have ...

[url]http://www.textism.com/[/url]
[url]http://www.dollarshort.org/[/url]
[url]http://www.molly.com/[/url]

Don't be surprise if, someday very soon, I say "I'm redesigning the TBox".  **I'd better get a real day job!**

PS. I want a dog (or more). I'd love to have dogs around (other than computers).
